name: Maya & Daniel
title: Wedding invite
summary: An elegant multi-section wedding site — live countdown, our story, details, travel, gallery, registry, a validating RSVP form, and an FAQ.
setup_questions: What are both your names, your wedding date, and the venue/city?
Where and when are the ceremony and reception, and is there a dress code?
Where should guests stay/fly into, and do you have a hotel block?
Which registry links should we include, and what meal options should the RSVP form offer?
photo_terms: outdoor wedding ceremony arch string lights
sections: Hero with names, date, venue, and a live countdown
Our Story (how they met, the proposal, a timeline)
The Details (ceremony + reception times, address, dress code)
RSVP form (attendance, guest count, meal preference, song request)
based_on: A Sonoma vineyard wedding site in the Zola/The Knot/With Joy mold — the canonical multi-section guest site with a countdown, Our Story, details, travel, registry, RSVP, and FAQ.
